name: 10× MOPS Buffer (RNA Gel Running Buffer)
nameCn: 10× MOPS 缓冲液（RNA 凝胶电泳缓冲液）

notes.en: Adjust pH to 7.0 with NaOH. MOPS is light-sensitive — store in dark bottle at RT (or 4°C). Solution yellowing = degraded, prepare fresh. Autoclave or filter-sterilize. Dilute 1:10 to 1× for gel and running buffer.
notes.zh: NaOH 调 pH 至 7.0。MOPS 对光敏感——棕色瓶中 RT 或 4°C 保存。溶液变黄 = 降解，需重新配制。可高压灭菌或过滤除菌。用时稀释 10 倍至 1×（凝胶和电泳缓冲液）。

ref: Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning 3rd ed.; Rio et al. (2010) RNA: A Laboratory Manual, CSHL Press

storage.notes: Light-sensitive; store in dark bottle; yellowing = degraded

usage.en: 10× MOPS buffer for denaturing RNA agarose gel electrophoresis.
usage.zh: 10× MOPS 缓冲液，用于 RNA 变性凝胶电泳。

prepSteps.step: Dissolve MOPS in ~700 mL DEPC-treated ddH₂O.
Bring to final volume of 1000 mL.
Autoclave; solution will turn yellow — this is normal and acceptable.
Store at room temperature in dark bottle.
